---
ID: US-CMP-FE-411
Title: Library filter bar
Status: Done
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-25
Ticket: CMP-FE-411
Epic: CMP-E4: Content Library, Search, and Discovery
---

As a user
I want to filter by campaign/topic/type/status/channel/author/assets so I can narrow content quickly.
So discovery scales as content volume grows.

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Filter controls use existing picker/button patterns.
- [ ] Active filters are visible and removable.
- [ ] Filter updates do not require full page reload.
- [ ] Filter state can be reset in one action.
- [ ] Filters respect user permission scope.
